# PAI-SAFE TRAVEL VERTICAL PROFILE

TravelFlowAI is a travel district / vertical experience surface.

Travel is not a new engine.
Cruise Line is a required travel dashboard profile.
Currency Intelligence is a required travel payment capability.

PAI-SAFE should verify, compare, authorize, and preserve the currency decision before payment consequence.

Final line:
Travel needs verified continuity across every payment, booking, change, cancellation, refund, loyalty, currency, and wellness moment.
